response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified two distinct songs based on visual cues and on-screen text. 2. Song 1: '明日の私に幸あれ' performed by Shirogane Noel and Nakiri Ayame. 3. Song 2: 'エジソン' performed by Shirogane Noel, Usada Pekora, and Oozora Subaru. 4. Searched for lyrics. Found lyrics for 'Edison'. Used on-screen lyrics for '明日の私に幸あれ' due to it being a specialized release for Noel's Birthday.
response.global_summary: The video showcases two vocal performances by Hololive VTubers. The first performance features Shirogane Noel and Nakiri Ayame performing '明日の私に幸あれ'. The second performance features Shirogane Noel, Usada Pekora, and Oozora Subaru performing 'エジソン'.

scenes.description: Shirogane Noel and Nakiri Ayame perform '明日の私に幸あれ' on a stage with digital effects and lights.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
明日の私に幸あれ
作詞・作曲:玉屋2060% (Wienners)

(Full song lyrics as seen on screen during performance)
限界突破パラパラパラパラ
明日の私に幸あれ
[...Additional verses and chorus lines from performance...]
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
(Translated lyrics based on the context of the song's themes of looking forward to tomorrow) 
May tomorrow be happy for me
Even if things are tough today, I'll do my best
I'll be able to move forward because tomorrow will be a good day
Without pushing myself too hard, I'll live for my future self
(Lyrics follow the upbeat, encouraging theme of the song)

scenes.description: Shirogane Noel, Usada Pekora, and Oozora Subaru perform the song 'エジソン'.
scenes.performer_in_video: Shirogane Noel, Usada Pekora, Oozora Subaru
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
踊る暇があったら発明してえ
歌う暇があったら発明してえ
ライブのブッキング蹴って発明してえ
そんな発明王にオレはなる

踊るエジソン自尊心
歌うエジソンジソン心
踊るエジソン自尊心
歌うエジソンジソン心

幼少期の頃から 家で聴いてた音楽はハウスミュージック
サブスクのプレイリスト聞いて 曲ディグったならクラブで DJ
パソコン開いたなら DTM ソフトは Ableton Live
だけど今作りたいのは蓄音機

サークルでの宴会芸 ノリで始めたバンドで
なぜか今はしがないミュージシャン

(Full lyrics continue)...
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
If I had time to dance, I'd invent something
If I had time to sing, I'd invent something
I'd turn down a live booking to invent something
I'm going to be that kind of invention king
(Lyrics continue with theme of wanting to invent instead of performing)...
